steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: The passage sets up a contrast with “But some studies of other crops have found the opposite effect.“ Jug found tilling increased wheat yield—so the opposite effect means no-tilling was better (or tilling was worse) for a different crop.

steps.title: Match the meaning
steps.content:
Choice A shows no-tilling had a positive effect on rice yield, which opposes Jug's pro-tilling result and involves a different crop.

Choices B and D show the same pro-tilling association Jug found (B with soybeans, D with wheat), while C provides raw yield numbers without any opposite effect.

That matches choice A — A is correct.
